payload.description:
## Summary
Make feedback-backed evaluations operationally reliable, with root-cause analysis treated as required process output rather than best-effort optional output.

## Scope
- RCA reliability is a separate workstream from deterministic dataset design.
- The goal is a single correct RCA path for feedback-backed evaluations.
- Successful completion should mean metrics and RCA are both present when RCA is enabled.

## Key assumptions
- RCA reliability is a dependency for high-trust optimization workflows.
- Missing RCA with incorrect items is a process-critical defect.
- Evaluation orchestration should treat the evaluation record as source of truth, not local CLI exit.

## Notes
Create the child bug/tasks in this epic exactly as planned so operational reliability work stays visible and auditable.
payload.title: Feedback Evaluation Reliability and RCA Contract
